case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. SAMUEL SANCHEZ MUNOZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNOZ, SAMUEL SANCHEZ $1,252.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,357.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 7/13/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MUNOZ, SAMUEL SANCHEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED MAY-21-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MUNOZ, SAMUEL SANCHEZ
